name: inline_width_mismatch
description: A positional inline attachment body whose value count does not match its declared inline schema MUST be rejected (SPEC 16.5). The row declares ^{name,email,tier} (3 fields) but the positional body 'Alice|alice@test.com' supplies only 2 values. Distinct from count_mismatch (row/section arity); this is inline-schema body arity.
